title: gardenia tessellaris
intro: Gardenia tessellaris, also known as the "Hawaiian gardenia" or "Ma'o hau hele," is a species of flowering plant in the gardenia family that is native to the Hawaiian Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of gardenia tessellaris include reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of gardenia tessellaris can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
